scripts.build: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:agents
scripts.build:site: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const file of ['site/index.html','site/robots.txt','site/sitemap.xml']) { if (!fs.existsSync(file)) throw new Error(file + ' is missing'); } console.log('site build ready');"
scripts.test: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:agents
